scores.correctness_notes: Parameters are correctly identified with right types, but the combine=False description is wrong — the gold standard says label must be unique (not that it replaces existing), and the agent inverts this. The combine=True description adds fabricated mechanics.
scores.hallucination_notes: The combine=True merge behavior description ('map keys are merged recursively, and list values are appended') is not in the gold standard and appears fabricated. Adding 'dict' as a separate type alongside 'LayerDict' is also not in the gold standard. The combine=False description ('replaces any existing layer') contradicts the gold standard ('must be unique').
